caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture, likely focused on systems thinking and its applications. The main screen displays a complex diagram with various interconnected nodes, each representing different concepts such as "awaken," "systems thinking," "model sharing," "what people do," and "future of society." These nodes are linked by arrows, suggesting relationships and processes between them. In the top right corner, there is a small inset video of the presenter, Gene Bellinger, who seems to be explaining the content. He gestures with his hand, possibly emphasizing a point or directing attention to specific parts of the diagram. The overall setting suggests an educational or professional context, where the presenter is guiding viewers through the intricacies of systems thinking and its relevance to various aspects of life and society.
